ap.volatility_summary: Intermediate play profile; nerf risk rated **Medium** for marketing/paytable drift.
ap.popularity_summary: Floor presence (from seed): **Common**. Treat as marketing signal, not proof of edge.
edge_vectors: Persistent meters / signatures on the glass — weak state vs strong state is the whole game.
Cross-meter correlation: one 'good' meter can be negated by bad neighbors.
Base-game RTP tax while you move state — count the dollars to clear, not only the top line.
ap.bankroll_angle: Size sessions for worst-case drawdown before the persistent / bonus state pays you back; confirm denom and max-bet rules the same visit you scout.
verification_checklist: Photo: each persistent ladder or meter family that matters for this title family.
Denom, line count, and any 'must bet' for progressive eligibility.
common_pitfalls: Assuming strip vs locals marketing matches this cabinet revision.
ap.nerf_angle: Nerf risk **Medium**: assume paytables, caps, and marketing can move without notice.
